counters.description: he has everything you don't want to face as yi (burst + invis). if he is smart and upgrade his r level 6, you won't be able to 1v1 him anymore (unless you are turbo fed). on top of that he can escape you easily if he lost the 1v1. be smart with your w and q to tempo him as much during his invis if you want a chance to win 1v1.

not played a lot but people tend to pick it as a natural counter when they see yi. he is not gonna be that much of a pain in early game so you gotta destroy him at this moment. don't let him scale or he will one shot you on taunt once he reaches 3+ items.

this one might be personal, but evelynn got everything to counter yi (cc, burst and invis). on top of that she can escape you easily. i hate this trash champ. hopefully she isn't really played anymore

annoying champ to face, you need to destroy him in early game and build tenacity because his fear will make you fly away really far because of your r. easy champ to 1v1 but he will ruin you and your mates in teamfight.

i know some kayn mains say that yi counters him, but he is a pain to face aswell. you must tempo his r with your w and dodge his q with your alpha strike. the issue is that he can tempo you for a long time with his r once he realises he lost the 1v1, which might prevent you from getting a kill , therefore denying you your resets and preventing you from snowballing the fight. however he is an easy target in a strict 1v1.
shit champ, it's basically a yi with more tanky options and a bruiser playstyle. you can beat her in 1v1 if you can dodge her q and soak her e with your w but be careful about her damages.

unbearable champ. she is faster than you, she deals tons of damage (burst + dps with her passive), she has cc and she is tanky. you can try to dodge her r by using your q just before getting asleep, and soak her q and w with your w. however if you can stick on her you will shred her like she's bambi's mother.
respect this champion. lot of burst, hard to dodge cc and he can tempo you with his e. be careful during ganks  because his r makes him the king of counter gank.
watch out for her early game because she deals tons of damage and can cc you. remember her e deals true damage if her rage bar is full so no point in using your w at this moment.

he will outgank you, counter jungle you, he has burst, invis and cc, his r can tempo you and finally he is played by motherf*cking otp. try to red smite him before he uses r to keep a track on who his the real shaco.

not a jungle champion but her r ruins your teamfight power because she will r the target you try (and need) to kill in order to reset your q and snowball the fight. you need to try to bait her r and quickly switch to another easily killable target to get your reset. if you are fed, you can try to dps 2 targets at the same time to make her panick and use her r on one of them (and you kill the other).
same issue as kayle but on top of that he makes his mates faster and he can cc you.
same issue as kayle and zil (oh and watch out in early game, because he hits hard).
she can tempo you a lot (w on you, r the target you are on), therefore giving you a hard time killing your target. you need tenacity vs her.
too much burst, too much control, very hard to dodge all her kit as yi. she will make your teamfights really hard to play.

tbh you can't 1v1 this champ because he has the unholy trinity of things that counters you (burst, cc and invis). you won't be able to deal him damage until he made his whole combo on you. avoid 1v1 and try to bait his spells (especially w) before killing him.

better burst, she has cc and she can tempo you with her e as a spider. note that most of elise player do double buff + gromp into a gank so use this knowledge to your advantage by warning your teamates and counter ganking / jungling her.

synergies.description: her shield can gives you the extra 2 seconds you need to kill your target and get your resets to snowball the teamfight.
if he times his r well, you will destroy your targets without taking a single damage.
she buffes your mobility and make you tankier.
a good r from her on you can win a teamfight.
her shield can gives you the extra 2 seconds you need to kill your target and get your resets to snowball the teamfight.
if he times his r well, you will destroy your targets without taking a single damage.
she buffes your mobility and make you tankier.
a good r from her on you can win a teamfight.
